title: Category Theory: EML Depth of Universal Structure

axioms: For each object a: ∃ id_a (identity morphism)
For f: a→b, g: b→c: ∃ g∘f: a→c (composition)
Identity: id_b ∘ f = f = f ∘ id_a
axioms.note: Category axioms are pure structure — no exp or log

category_basics.key_insight: Category axioms = EML-0; functor counts = EML-1; functor category = EML-∞

yoneda_lemma.statement: Nat(Hom(a,-), F) ≅ F(a) naturally in a and F
yoneda_lemma.reading: An object a is completely determined by how other objects map INTO it
yoneda_lemma.reason: Object's essence = all its relationships: irreducibly relational = EML-∞
yoneda_lemma.corollary: Yoneda embedding: C → [C^op, Set] is fully faithful — C lives inside EML-∞

representable_functors.functor: L²(X,μ) — Hilbert space of square-integrable functions

yoneda_representability.key_insight: Yoneda bijection = EML-0; what it MEANS (object = relationships) = EML-∞

two_category.coherence_pentagon: EML-∞ (coherence laws = EML-∞ to verify in general)
two_category.weak_2cat_bicategory: EML-∞ (associativity holds up to coherent iso = EML-∞)

infinity_groupoid.note: Individual homotopy groups = EML-0; general computation = EML-∞

higher_category.key_insight: Strict categories = EML-0; coherence for weak n-cats = EML-∞; topos logic = EML-∞

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: All category axioms, morphism composition, limits/colimits, strict n-cats, hom-sets
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Derived functors (Ext, Tor), cohomology, sheaf theory
eml_depth_summary.EML-3: Not prominently represented in pure category theory
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Yoneda meaning, weak n-categories, topos logic, ∞-categories, homotopy types

key_theorem: The EML Category Theory Depth Theorem: Category theory is the mathematics of EML-0 structure. Objects, morphisms, functors, natural transformations, limits — all EML-0. The Yoneda lemma is EML-0 (the bijection) but EML-∞ in meaning: an object is nothing but its relationships — pure relational essence. Higher category theory (weak n-cats, ∞-groupoids, toposes) reaches EML-∞: coherence conditions and homotopy types are not EML-finitely classifiable. Category theory is the language in which EML-0 speaks about EML-∞.
rabbit_hole_log: Category axioms = EML-0: the purest possible mathematics
Yoneda bijection = EML-0; but Yoneda meaning = EML-∞ (object = all its maps)
Functor count n_D^{n_C} = EML-1: exponential in objects
Sheaf condition = EML-0 (universal property); cohomology from sheaves = EML-2
Homotopy groups π_n(S^n)=ℤ = EML-0; general π_n computation = EML-∞
EML operator itself is a category (arrow category): eml ∈ EML-0 meta-structure!

connections.S149_foundations_v3: Cohen forcing / L-constructible = EML-2; category-theoretic models also = EML-2
connections.S157_anyons: Fusion categories (anyons) = EML-∞; tensor categories = EML-0 structure + EML-∞ braiding
connections.S158_cellular_automata: EML-0 rules → EML-∞ computation; same as EML-0 axioms → EML-∞ in Gödel/CT
